definition.name: eps_jb_algebra
definition.definition: An eps-JB algebra (order-unit form) is a finite-dimensional real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm ||.||, plus a commutative bilinear product o for which commutativity a o b=b o a and the unit law 1 o a=a hold EXACTLY, and such that for all a,b: (JB1) ||a o b||<=(1+eps)||a||||b||; (JB2) ||a o a||>=(1-eps)||a||^2; (JB3) a o a >= -eps||a||^2 1; (JB4) ||((a o a)o b)o a-(a o a)o(b o a)||<=eps||a||^3||b||. The order, unit, and norm are exact; only the product carries the defect. (def-eps-jb-algebra)
